message.content:
# Mobile App Screenshot Analysis: Movie Details Page (Shogun's Ninja)

## 1. Overall Layout Structure
The layout follows a vertical scrollable structure with distinct sections:
- Top: Status bar + Browser navigation bar
- Main content: Dark blue (#1A2332) background with white text
- Primary section: Movie details card (dark blue background, rounded corners)
- Secondary section: Synopsis card (slightly lighter blue background, rounded corners)
- Bottom: System navigation bar

## 2. Status Bar
- **Time**: 9:06 (white text, top-left)
- **Icons**: 
  - Signal indicators (4G, white)
  - Wi-Fi (white)
  - Battery (white, partially charged)
  - Additional system icons (white)
- **Background**: White (#FFFFFF)

## 3. Navigation/Header Bar
- **Browser address bar**: Light gray (#F0F0F0) background
  - URL: "ysflix.com/movie/shoguns" (dark gray text)
  - Icons: 
    - Back arrow (black)
    - Refresh (black)
    - Plus (black)
    - Bookmark (black)
    - Menu (black)
- **Height**: ~56px (standard mobile browser bar)

## 4. Movie Poster
- **Position**: Top-left of primary card
- **Size**: ~180px width × 270px height (16:9 aspect ratio)
- **Shape**: Rectangular with sharp corners
- **Border**: None
- **Content**: Action movie poster showing two ninja characters against a moon background
- **Spacing**: 24px from top, 24px from left of card

## 5. Movie Title
- **Text**: "Shogun's Ninja"
- **Font**: Bold, sans-serif (likely Roboto Bold)
- **Size**: 28px
- **Color**: White (#FFFFFF)
- **Position**: Below poster, left-aligned
- **Spacing**: 16px below poster

## 6. Rating Display
- **Elements**: 
  - Yellow star icon (filled)
  - "6.3" text (white, 18px)
  - Bullet separator (white, 4px)
  - "2025" text (white, 16px)
  - Bullet separator (white, 4px)
  - "76 min" text (white, 16px)
- **Layout**: Horizontal row, left-aligned
- **Position**: Below title
- **Spacing**: 12px below title

## 7. Genre Tags
- **Style**: Rounded rectangular pills
- **Color**: Bright green (#4CAF50) background, white text
- **Shape**: Rounded corners (8px)
- **Text**: "Action, History"
- **Size**: 14px font
- **Spacing**: 12px below rating, 8px right margin between tags

## 8. Metadata Section
- **Layout**: Vertical list with labels and values
- **Elements**:
  - **Director**:
    - Label: "Director" (gray, 14px, #888888)
    - Value: "坂本浩一" (white, 16px)
  - **Release Date**:
    - Label: "Release Date" (gray, 14px)
    - Value: "Jo/2/Jo J9" (white, 16px)
- **Spacing**: 16px between metadata items, 24px from genre tags

## 9. Download Section
- **Not visible** in this screenshot (likely below fold or on separate tab)

## 10. Video Player / Trailer Area
- **Not visible** in this screenshot (likely below synopsis section)

## 11. Color Scheme
- **Primary background**: Dark blue (#1A2332)
- **Card backgrounds**: Slightly lighter blue (#1E2A3A)
- **Text colors**: 
  - Primary: White (#FFFFFF)
  - Secondary: Gray (#888888)
- **Accent colors**: 
  - Green: #4CAF50 (genre tags, synopsis button)
  - Yellow: #FFD700 (star rating)

## 12. Card/Section Backgrounds
- **Primary card**: Dark blue (#1A2332) with 12px border radius
- **Synopsis card**: Slightly lighter blue (#1E2A3A) with 12px border radius
- **Shadows**: Subtle 4px drop shadow on cards (rgba(0,0,0,0.1))

## 13. Icons, Dividers, Spacing
- **Dividers**: None visible (sections separated by spacing)
- **Icons**: 
  - Star rating (yellow)
  - Browser navigation icons (black/white)
- **Spacing**:
  - 24px padding inside cards
  - 16px vertical spacing between elements
  - 8px horizontal spacing between metadata labels and values

## 14. Bottom Navigation or Action Buttons
- **Synopsis button**: Green (#4CAF50) pill button, white text, 16px font, 12px padding
- **Cast List link**: White text, 16px font, right-aligned
- **Position**: Top of synopsis card
- **Layout**: Horizontal row with button on left, link on right

## 15. Scroll Indicators or Other UI Elements
- **Synopsis section**:
  - Title: "Synopsis" (white, 20px, bold)
  - Subtitle: "Shogun's Ninja (2025)" (white, 16px)
  - Rating: "IMDb Rating (6.4)" (white, 14px)
  - Description: Multiline text (white, 14px) in Burmese script
- **System navigation bar**: Standard Android navigation (back, home, recent apps)
- **Scroll indicator**: Not visible (content fits screen height)

## Additional Details
- **Typography hierarchy**:
  - Title: 28px bold
  - Section headers: 20px bold
  - Metadata labels: 14px regular
  - Metadata values: 16px regular
  - Body text: 14px regular
- **Language**: Mixed (English title, Japanese director name, Burmese description)
- **URL**: Indicates streaming service (ysflix.com)
- **Device**: Android phone (visible system navigation)
